decontamination_notes: Real feature from networkx/networkx PR #8506, merged 2026-02-28, after model training cutoffs. Extends the VF2++ matcher (NP-complete subgraph matching) from whole-graph isomorphism to node-induced subgraph isomorphism and monomorphism, six net-new public functions built on a rewritten matcher core. Graded on exact reference outputs that hinge on the induced-vs-injection distinction (K4 has zero induced P3 subgraphs but 24 P3 monomorphisms), so a plausible-but-wrong implementation fails. Repo sliced at base commit (193k LOC); BSD LICENSE preserved. networkx has no required runtime deps, so this runs in the base sandbox image with PYTHONPATH=.
